title: Two Sum
description: Return indices of two numbers that add up to a target.

title: Best Time to Buy and Sell Stock
description: Find the maximum profit from a single buy/sell.

title: Contains Duplicate
description: Check if any value appears at least twice in the array.

title: Product of Array Except Self
description: Return an array where each index is the product of all other elements.

title: Maximum Subarray
description: Kadane's algorithm — find the contiguous subarray with the largest sum.

title: Container With Most Water
description: Find two lines that together with the x-axis form a container holding the most water.

title: 3Sum
description: Find all unique triplets that sum to zero.

title: Trapping Rain Water
description: Compute total rainwater trapped between elevation bars.

title: Valid Anagram
description: Determine if two strings are anagrams of each other.

title: Valid Palindrome
description: Check if a string is a palindrome considering only alphanumerics.

title: Longest Substring Without Repeating Characters
description: Find the length of the longest substring without duplicate characters.

title: Longest Repeating Character Replacement
description: Find the longest substring achievable with at most k character replacements.

title: Minimum Window Substring
description: Find the smallest window in s that contains all characters of t.

title: Group Anagrams
description: Group strings that are anagrams of each other.

title: Top K Frequent Elements
description: Return the k most frequent elements in an array.

title: Subarray Sum Equals K
description: Count contiguous subarrays whose sum equals k using prefix sums.

title: Longest Consecutive Sequence
description: Find the length of the longest consecutive elements sequence in O(n).

title: Reverse Linked List
description: Reverse a singly linked list iteratively.

title: Linked List Cycle
description: Detect if a linked list has a cycle (Floyd's tortoise and hare).

title: Merge Two Sorted Lists
description: Merge two sorted linked lists into one sorted list.

title: Reorder List
description: Reorder L0 → L_n → L1 → L_{n-1} → L2 → ...

title: Valid Parentheses
description: Check if a string of brackets is balanced using a stack.

title: Min Stack
description: Design a stack supporting push, pop, top, and getMin in O(1).

title: Daily Temperatures
description: For each day, find how many days until a warmer temperature (monotonic stack).

title: Largest Rectangle in Histogram
description: Find the largest rectangle that fits inside a histogram.

title: Maximum Depth of Binary Tree
description: Return the depth of a binary tree.

title: Invert Binary Tree
description: Mirror a binary tree by swapping left and right children at every node.

title: Same Tree
description: Determine if two binary trees are structurally identical.

title: Binary Tree Level Order Traversal
description: Return the values of a binary tree level by level.

title: Validate Binary Search Tree
description: Check if a binary tree satisfies the BST invariant.

title: Lowest Common Ancestor of a BST
description: Find the LCA of two nodes in a BST.

title: Binary Tree Maximum Path Sum
description: Find the maximum path sum in a binary tree (path can start and end anywhere).

title: Number of Islands
description: Count the number of connected land regions in a 2D grid.

title: Clone Graph
description: Deep copy an undirected graph.

title: Course Schedule
description: Detect cycles in a directed graph (topological sort).

title: Pacific Atlantic Water Flow
description: Find cells that can flow to both the Pacific and Atlantic oceans.

title: Word Ladder
description: Find the shortest transformation sequence from beginWord to endWord.

title: Climbing Stairs
description: Count the number of distinct ways to climb n stairs (Fibonacci).

title: House Robber
description: Maximize money robbed from non-adjacent houses.

title: Coin Change
description: Find the fewest coins needed to make up an amount.

title: Longest Increasing Subsequence
description: Find the length of the longest strictly increasing subsequence.

title: Word Break
description: Determine if a string can be segmented into dictionary words.

title: Edit Distance
description: Find the minimum number of operations to convert one string into another.

title: Jump Game
description: Determine if you can reach the last index of an array.

title: Gas Station
description: Find the starting gas station from which you can complete the circuit.

title: Subsets
description: Generate all possible subsets of a set.

title: Permutations
description: Return all possible permutations of distinct integers.

title: Combination Sum
description: Find all unique combinations of candidates that sum to target.

title: Word Search
description: Find if a word exists in a 2D board of letters.

title: N-Queens
description: Place n queens on an n×n board so that no two attack each other.

title: Binary Search
description: Classic binary search on a sorted array.

title: Search in Rotated Sorted Array
description: Search for a target in a rotated sorted array in O(log n).

title: Find Minimum in Rotated Sorted Array
description: Find the smallest element in a rotated sorted array.

title: Median of Two Sorted Arrays
description: Find the median of two sorted arrays in O(log(min(m,n))).
